Item Name: Eastanbul Sage Leaves, 1.41oz, Dried Sage Leaf, Salvia Tea, Loose Leaf Herbal Tea, Te de Salvia, Perfect for Cooking, Caffeine-Free, Natural, Vegan, Gluten Free, Non GMO Bullet Point 1: Aromatic Delight in Every Sip: Enjoy the rich, earthy tones and slightly minty flavor of dried sage leaves tea Bullet Point 2: Pure Sage Herb: Made from 100% natural sage herb with no additives, MSG, fillers, or preservatives, ensuring a non-GMO product that delivers a refreshing and earthy taste, perfect for daily enjoyment Bullet Point 3: Perfect Gift for Tea Enthusiasts : Delight the tea lover in your life with a thoughtful gift of sage tea. Its timeless charm and soothing properties make it an ideal present for any occasion Bullet Point 4: Multipurpose Sage Leaf: Whether you're brewing tea or seasoning your dishes, our loose sage serves as both a delicious drink and a flavorful herb. While primarily a tea, our dried sage can also be used as rubbed sage seasoning for culinary creations Bullet Point 5: Tea Matters! Our brand embraces responsible manufacturing, material transparency, and workplace diversity and is committed to the utmost customer satisfaction standards Product Description:

SAGE TEA

  • Origin: Sage tea is made from the leaves of the Salvia officinalis plant, a herb native to the Mediterranean region and widely cultivated for its culinary and medicinal uses.
  • Ingredients: 100% dried sage leaves, carefully harvested and dried to preserve their flavor and therapeutic properties.
  • Taste and Aroma: Sage tea offers a warm, earthy flavor with subtle hints of pine and citrus. The aroma is aromatic and herbaceous.
  • Uses: It can be consumed hot or iced and is often sweetened with honey or lemon.
  • Substitutes: Peppermint or chamomile tea, can be used as alternatives if sage tea is not available.
  • Fun Fact: It is known for its aromatic qualities.
Value: 1.41 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Herbal tea product positioned as a natural, multipurpose ingredient for both culinary and beverage use. Mid-range packaging with clear glass jar suggests visibility of product quality. No premium or organic certifications visible, indicating a standard market offering. Pricing likely driven by herb sourcing, packaging material, and multipurpose utility.
